import io
import string
import list

fn parse_list(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_list(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

match find_index(nums, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
